user.label: Navigation related to your user account

footer.disclaimer: MBO is unofficial Fan Content permitted under the {fcp}. Not approved/endorsed by Wizards. Portions of the materials used are property of Wizards of the Coast. © Wizards of the Coast LLC.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.claim: Keep your collection of magic cards organized.
welcome.intro: While building a new deck, you want to add a specific card. You know that you own the card - somewhere in your 10+ binders/boxes/whatever. After searching for half an hour, you give up and buy a new copy. Sounds familiar? MBO is for you.

oracle.title: Oracle Cards
oracle.explanation: One card for each Oracle ID. The chosen sets for the cards are an attempt to return the most up-to-date recognizable version of the card.

default.title: Default Cards
default.explanation: Every card in English or the printed language if the card is only available in one language.

sets.title: Sets
sets.explanation: Every set, including many un-official sets as a way to group promotional or outlier cards together.

artists.title: Artists
artists.explanation: Every artist that has created artwork for a MtG card.

artCrops.title: Art Crops
artCrops.explanation: Card images, cropped so it shows only the art itself.

cardImages.title: Card Images
cardImages.explanation: Scanned images of the full card.

scryfall.title: Scryfall
scryfall.explanation: Scryfall is the backbone of all MtG community websites.

cards.title: Total cards
cards.explanation: The number of cards in collections.

containers.title: Containers
containers.explanation: The number of containers organized in MBO.

worth.title: Total worth
worth.explanation: The total worth of cards organized in MBO collections.

register.title: Registration
register.intro: After registering, we will send you a link to verify your e-mail address. You can login after verifying your e-mail address.

login.title: Login
login.nav_label: If you can't login, use these links.

forgot.title: Can't login?
forgot.intro: If you can't access your user account, we can send you either your user name or a link that resets your password. Simply select either password or user name, and provide your e-mail address. If you have forgotten the password, you will also need to enter your username.

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.intro: Enter your new password. After saving you can login using your new password.

resend_verification.title: Resend verification link
resend_verification.intro: If your verification link has expired, you can request a new link to verify your e-mail-address. Please supply the e-mail address and the username.

password.headline: Change Password
password.intro: You can change your password by entering the current password and the new password.

profile.headline: Update Profile
profile.intro: You can change your E-Mail address and/or your username. If you update either, you will be logged out and need to login with the new data. If you update the E-Mail address, you will need to verify it by clicking on the link that we send you.

two_factor.headline: Two-Factor authentication
two_factor.intro: Two-factor authentication uses a {totp}. You will need an appropriate app, like Google/Microsoft Authenticator or {tool1} / {tool2}.
two_factor.requires_confirmation: To activate, you need to provide your password.

setup.title: Setup Two-Factor Authentication
setup.explanation: finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code in your authenticator app, or enter the code manually.

verification.title: Confirm 2FA
verification.explanation: Enter the one-time password from your app and click on 'Confirm'.

recovery_codes.headline: Recovery Codes
recovery_codes.explanation: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recovery_codes.label: Recovery codes

regenerate_codes.explanation: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, use the button 'Regenerate Codes'

disable_section.headline: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disable_section.explanation: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.

deletion.title: Delete user account
deletion.explanation: If needed, you can delete your user account. {caution} - this action deletes everything associated with your user account, including your collection and decks.
deletion.no_soft_deletes: We do not use {soft_deletes}, the account is deleted forever.
deletion.reversed: This action can not be reversed, we can't restore a deleted user account.

modal.title: Confirm deletion
modal.explanation: Are you sure you want to delete your user account permanently?

about.title: About MBO
about.intro: MBO is a hobby project with a single developer. I started developing the site not because I wasn't happy with the 'other' MtG sites, but because I wanted to do it a bit differently. This is the result.
about.security_text: Do not open public Github Issues for security vulnerabilities - instead, check our {link}, which includes instructions how to report them.

attribution.title: Attribution
attribution.scryfall: The pillar of MtG community websites. Scryfall provides the data that drives MBO - all data about cards, sets, artists and all card images come from them. Sites like this would not be possible without the developers and the community over at Scryfall.
attribution.laravel: {cite} provides the backend (server) framework for MBO. Laravel is an opinionated full-stack framework.
attribution.vue: is the frontend framework that powers the client - what's running in your browser. VueJS is easy to get into, and complex enough to power enterprise solutions.
attribution.images: Images {maintenance} and {notfound} by {author} from {source} licensed under the {license}.
attribution.icons: Icons used throughout the site are from {link}, licensed under the Apache-2.0 License.
attribution.symbols: MtG symbols © Wizards of the Coast LLC. SVGs provided by {scryfall} and used under the {fcp}.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.preamble_text: With the following privacy policy, we would like to inform you about the types of your personal data (hereinafter also referred to as "data") that we process, for what purposes, and to what extent. This privacy policy applies to all processing of personal data carried out by us.
privacy.gender_note: The terms used are not gender-specific.
privacy.processing_overview_text: The following overview summarizes the types of data processed and the purposes of their processing and refers to the data subjects.
privacy.processing_purposes_provision: Provision of our online services and user-friendliness.
privacy.legal_bases_intro: Relevant legal bases under the GDPR:
privacy.legal_bases_text: Below you will find an overview of the legal bases of the GDPR on which we process personal data. Please note that in addition to the provisions of the GDPR, national data protection regulations may apply in your or our country of residence or domicile. If more specific legal bases are relevant in individual cases, we will inform you of these in the privacy policy.
privacy.legal_consent_text: The data subject has given consent to the processing of their personal data for one or more specific purposes.
privacy.legal_obligation_text: Processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the controller is subject.
privacy.legal_interest_text: Processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party, except where such interests are overridden by the interests or fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject which require protection of personal data.
privacy.national_regulations_title: National data protection regulations in Germany:
privacy.national_regulations_text: In addition to the data protection regulations of the GDPR, national regulations on data protection apply in Germany. This includes in particular the Federal Data Protection Act (Bundesdatenschutzgesetz – BDSG). The BDSG contains special regulations on the right to information, the right to deletion, the right to object, the processing of special categories of personal data, processing for other purposes, and transmission as well as automated decision-making in individual cases including profiling. Furthermore, state data protection laws of the individual federal states may apply.
privacy.security_measures_text_1: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures in accordance with legal requirements, taking into account the state of the art, the costs of implementation, and the nature, scope, circumstances, and purposes of processing, as well as the different probabilities of occurrence and the extent of the threat to the rights and freedoms of natural persons, to ensure a level of protection appropriate to the risk.
privacy.security_measures_text_2: The measures include in particular ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data by controlling physical and electronic access to the data, as well as access, input, disclosure, ensuring availability, and separation thereof. Furthermore, we have established procedures that ensure the exercise of data subject rights, the deletion of data, and responses to data threats. We also consider the protection of personal data during the development and selection of hardware, software, and procedures in accordance with the principle of data protection by design and by default.
privacy.security_tls: Securing online connections through TLS/SSL encryption technology (HTTPS): To protect user data transmitted via our online services from unauthorized access, we use TLS/SSL encryption technology. Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) and Transport Layer Security (TLS) are the cornerstones of secure data transmission on the Internet. These technologies encrypt the information transmitted between the website or app and the user's browser (or between two servers), protecting the data from unauthorized access. TLS, as the more advanced and secure version of SSL, ensures that all data transmissions meet the highest security standards. When a website is secured by an SSL/TLS certificate, this is indicated by the display of HTTPS in the URL. This serves as an indicator for users that their data is being transmitted securely and encrypted.
privacy.hosting: Provision of Online Services and Web Hosting
privacy.hosting_text: We process user data to provide our online services. For this purpose, we process the user's IP address, which is necessary to deliver the content and functions of our online services to the user's browser or device.
privacy.hosting_data_types: Usage data (e.g., page views and dwell time, click paths, usage intensity and frequency, device types and operating systems used, interactions with content and features); meta, communication, and procedural data (e.g., IP addresses, timestamps, identification numbers, persons involved).
privacy.hosting_affected: Users (e.g., website visitors, users of online services).
privacy.hosting_purposes: Provision of our online services and user-friendliness; information technology infrastructure (operation and provision of information systems and technical devices (computers, servers, etc.)). Security measures.
privacy.hosting_retention: Deletion in accordance with the information in the section "General Information on Data Storage and Deletion".
privacy.hosting_notes: Further notes on processing operations, procedures, and services:
privacy.hosting_rented_title: Provision of online services on rented storage space:
privacy.hosting_rented_text: For the provision of our online services, we use storage space, computing capacity, and software that we rent or otherwise obtain from a corresponding server provider (also known as a "web host");
privacy.hosting_logs_title: Collection of access data and log files:
privacy.hosting_logs_text: Access to our online services is logged in the form of so-called "server log files". Server log files may include the address and name of the accessed web pages and files, date and time of access, data volumes transferred, notification of successful access, browser type and version, the user's operating system, referrer URL (the previously visited page), and as a rule, IP addresses and the requesting provider. Server log files can be used for security purposes, e.g., to avoid server overload (especially in the case of abusive attacks, so-called DDoS attacks), and to ensure server utilization and stability;
privacy.hosting_logs_deletion_text: Log file information is stored for a maximum of 30 days and then deleted or anonymized. Data whose further retention is necessary for evidentiary purposes is exempt from deletion until the final clarification of the respective incident.
privacy.hetzner_text: Services in the field of providing information technology infrastructure and related services (e.g., storage space and/or computing capacity);
privacy.cookies_text: The term "cookies" refers to functions that store information on users' devices and read information from them. Cookies can also be used for various purposes, such as for the functionality, security, and convenience of online services, as well as for the creation of visitor flow analyses. We use cookies in accordance with legal requirements. We obtain prior consent from users where required. If consent is not necessary, we rely on our legitimate interests. This applies when storing and reading information is essential to provide explicitly requested content and functions. This includes, for example, saving settings and ensuring the functionality and security of our online services. Consent can be revoked at any time. We clearly inform about the scope and which cookies are used.
privacy.cookies_legal_title: Notes on data protection legal bases:
privacy.cookies_legal_text: Whether we process personal data using cookies depends on consent. If consent is given, it serves as the legal basis. Without consent, we rely on our legitimate interests, which are explained above in this section and in the context of the respective services and procedures.
privacy.cookies_duration_text: With regard to the storage duration, the following types of cookies are distinguished:
privacy.cookies_temp_text: Temporary cookies are deleted at the latest after a user has left an online service and closed their device (e.g., browser or mobile application).
privacy.cookies_perm_text: Permanent cookies remain stored even after the device is closed. For example, the login status can be saved and preferred content displayed directly when the user revisits a website. User data collected with cookies can also be used for reach measurement. Unless we provide users with explicit information about the type and storage duration of cookies (e.g., when obtaining consent), they should assume that these are permanent and that the storage duration can be up to two years.
privacy.cookies_optout_title: General notes on revocation and objection (opt-out):
privacy.cookies_optout_text: Users can revoke their consent at any time and also object to processing in accordance with legal requirements, including through the privacy settings of their browser.
privacy.cookies_data_types: Meta, communication, and procedural data (e.g., IP addresses, timestamps, identification numbers, persons involved).
privacy.cookies_affected: Users (e.g., website visitors, users of online services).
privacy.registration_text: Users can create a user account. During registration, users are informed of the required mandatory information, which is processed for the purpose of providing the user account on the basis of contractual obligation. The processed data includes in particular the login information (username, password, and an email address).
privacy.registration_retention: Users can delete their user account independently.
privacy.registration_legal: Contract performance and pre-contractual inquiries (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
privacy.registration_notes: Further notes on processing operations, procedures, and services:
privacy.registration_pseudonym_text: Users may use pseudonyms as usernames instead of real names;
privacy.registration_pseudonym_legal: Contract performance and pre-contractual inquiries (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
privacy.registration_profiles_text: User profiles are not publicly visible or accessible.
privacy.registration_2fa_text: Two-factor authentication provides an additional layer of security for your user account and ensures that only you can access your account, even if someone else knows your password. For this purpose, you must perform an additional authentication measure in addition to your password (e.g., enter a code sent to a mobile device). We will inform you about the method we use;
privacy.registration_2fa_legal: Contract performance and pre-contractual inquiries (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
privacy.registration_noretention_text: It is the users' responsibility to back up their data before the end of the contract upon termination. We are entitled to irretrievably delete all data stored during the contract period;
privacy.registration_noretention_legal: Contract performance and pre-contractual inquiries (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
privacy.registration_protection_notes: Further notes on processing operations, procedures, and services:
privacy.registration_protection_text: Users decide for themselves what data they disclose about themselves within our online services. For example, when users provide personal information or participate in conversations. We ask users to protect their data and to publish personal data only with caution and only to the extent necessary. In particular, we ask users to note that they must protect their access data especially carefully and use secure passwords (i.e., above all, as long and random character combinations as possible);
privacy.registration_protection_legal: Contract performance and pre-contractual inquiries (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
privacy.changes_text: We ask you to regularly inform yourself about the content of our privacy policy. We adapt the privacy policy as soon as changes in data processing carried out by us make this necessary. We will inform you as soon as the changes require your participation (e.g., consent) or other individual notification.
privacy.changes_addresses: If we provide addresses and contact information of companies and organizations in this privacy policy, please note that addresses may change over time and please verify the information before contacting us.
privacy.generated_by: Generated with the free privacy policy generator by Dr. Thomas Schwenke
privacy.purposes_label: Purposes of processing and legitimate interests:

imprint.title: Legal notice
imprint.responsible: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV:
imprint.dispute_resolution: Consumer dispute resolution / Universal arbitration board
imprint.dispute_resolution_text: We do not participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board and are not obligated to do so.
imprint.liability_content_text: The contents of our pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 (1) DDG. According to §§ 8 to 10 DDG, however, we as a service provider are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a specific legal violation. Upon becoming aware of corresponding legal violations, we will remove this content immediately.
imprint.liability_links_text: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages. The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognizable at the time of linking. However, permanent content monitoring of the linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a legal violation. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will remove such links immediately.
imprint.copyright_text: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, distribution, and any kind of exploitation beyond the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator. Downloads and copies of this page are only permitted for private, non-commercial use. Insofar as the content on this page was not created by the operator, the copyrights of third parties are respected. In particular, third-party content is identified as such. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, please notify us accordingly. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will remove such content immediately.

totalCards.title: Total Cards
totalCards.explanation: The total number of cards in your collection.

totalStacks.title: Unique Stacks
totalStacks.explanation: The number of distinct card stacks in your collection.

totalPrice.title: Total Value
totalPrice.explanation: The estimated total value of your collection based on current market prices.

containers.title: Containers
containers.explanation: The number of containers you use to organize your collection.

commons.title: Commons
commons.explanation: The number of common cards in your collection.

uncommons.title: Uncommons
uncommons.explanation: The number of uncommon cards in your collection.

rares.title: Rares
rares.explanation: The number of rare cards in your collection.

mythics.title: Mythics
mythics.explanation: The number of mythic rare cards in your collection.

nuke.title: Are you really sure?
nuke.summary: You are about to delete your collection containing {amount} cards organized in {containers} with a total worth of {worth}.
nuke.question: Are you really sure? This action can't be reverted.

containers.title: My Containers
containers.explanation: Containers are the backbone of your collection - digitally organize your cards like you do with the paper cards in real life.
containers.none: You have not created any containers yet. Start organizing your collection by creating one!
containers.sort_error: The sort order could not be saved. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete Container {name}?
delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete this container? This action can not be undone.
delete.warning: This container has {amount} cards worth a total of {worth}.

prune.title: Delete all cards from the container '{name}'?
prune.warning: This container has {amount} cards worth a total of {worth}.
prune.question: Are you sure you want to delete all cards from this container? This action can not be undone.

container_page.empty: This container has no cards yet.

delete.title: Delete card stack?
delete.question: Are you sure you want to remove {description} from {container}? This action can not be undone.

move.title: Move cards?
move.question: You have selected {amount} card stacks from {container} - where do you want to move them?

delete_selected.title: Delete selected card stacks?
delete_selected.question: Are you sure you want to delete {amount} card stacks from {container}? This action can not be undone.

mass_move.title: Move all cards from {source}?
mass_move.question: You are about to move all {amount} cards out of {source}. Please choose the target container.

container_qr.title: Create QR code for {name}
container_qr.explanation: Generate a QR Code for {name}. The QR code points to the detail page of the container - print the QR code on a sticker and place it on a container.

mbo.line1: When importing from our own import format, we will match the container according to the container id column - the 'Import to' dropdown is ignored.
mbo.line2: If you want to import all cards to a specific container - regardless of origin - empty the 'container id' column in the CSV file.

archidekt.line1: Archidekt allows you to choose the columns that you want to have exported.
archidekt.line2: Please use these columns to ensure we can map the import correctly: Quantity, Card Name, Foil, Condition, Language, Edition Code, Collector Number, Scryfall ID.

defaults.title: Defaults
defaults.explanation: You can use the current settings as defaults so they will be used when you return to this page. Clearing the current defaults will return to app-wide defaults.

legend.required: Fields marked with a {icon} are required.
legend.password: When entering your password, we check if the password is secure enough. Insecure passwords are rejected.
legend.2fa: Your account has enabled two-factor authentication. Please check your app for a one-time password, or use a recovery code to login.

container.name: Name
container.visibility_private: Private - only you can view this container.

search.showing: Show {visible} results of {total} total. Scroll for more.

tips.general: You can use spaces to separate your query - {query} finds (among others) {result}.
tips.set: You can also use {set_codes} to restrict your search the specific sets. {set_example} restricts to cards from {set_result}.
tips.cn: You can use {cn_codes} to find specific collector numbers - {cn_example} finds {cn_result}.
tips.combined: You can also combine different methods - {combined_example} finds {combined_result}.
tips.combined_result: Dawnhand Eulogist - collector number 99 in Lorwyn Eclipsed

deck_format_capabilities.title: Deck construction rules
deck_format_capabilities.deck_size_min: Deck must contain at least {count} cards.
deck_format_capabilities.singleton: Singleton format: except for basic lands, only one copy of each card is allowed.
deck_format_capabilities.max_copies: Up to {count} copies of each non-basic card are allowed.
deck_format_capabilities.commander: Requires a commander. The commander counts toward the deck size and starts in the command zone.
deck_format_capabilities.commander_partners: Requires a commander. Two partner commanders may share the slot; both count toward the deck size and start in the command zone.
deck_format_capabilities.color_identity: All cards must fall within the commander's color identity.
deck_format_capabilities.signature_spell: Requires a signature spell — an instant or sorcery matching the oathbreaker's color identity. It counts toward the deck size and is cast from the command zone while the oathbreaker is on the battlefield.
